hero_layout: centered — everything stacked in the middle
hero_height: auto — natural content height, no forced height
nav_style: minimal floating — small pill in corner
scroll_animation: none — everything static and immediately visible
contact_style: map-themed — as if marking your location
spacing_density: ultra-spacious — luxury feel, huge gaps between sections
color_scheme: mixed — alternating dark and light sections
quirk: use a single accent color — everything else is grayscale
bonus_quirk: the daily regen banner is styled as a handwritten note
